title: Fathom vs Heap
description: Should you choose Fathom or Heap? We put both analytics & data platforms through a comprehensive feature comparison to help you decide which one fits your team best.
verdict: Fathom emerges as the winner in this comparison based on overall feature depth, user satisfaction ratings, and value for money in the Analytics & Data category. While both platforms are strong contenders, Fathom offers the better balance of features, pricing, and user experience for most use cases.

faqs.question: Which is better for small teams, Fathom or Heap?
faqs.answer: For small teams, the choice often comes down to ease of setup and pricing. Fathom tends to be more intuitive for new users, while Heap offers more advanced features that smaller teams may not need immediately. Consider your team's technical comfort level and growth plans.

faqs.question: Can Fathom and Heap be integrated?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer API access and integration capabilities, making it possible to use them together if needed. However, most teams find it more efficient to standardize on one platform to avoid data duplication and workflow fragmentation.
